overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through an indoor arcade area and exiting into the neon-lit streets of Night City. The clip features futuristic architecture, holographic advertisements, and light vehicle traffic in a dense urban environment at dusk.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor arcade with gaming machines and vending equipment

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the indoor arcade past rows of gaming machines and neon-lit vending equipment

entered.detail: rows of gaming machines with glowing screens lining the left side
futuristic vending machines with illuminated displays and product advertisements
hanging neon signage with cyberpunk aesthetic lighting the corridor
large digital billboard displaying animated character advertisements overhead

segments.scene_description: The segment takes place in a narrow indoor arcade corridor filled with gaming cabinets and vending machines. Neon lights cast a colorful glow on the concrete floor as the camera moves steadily forward through the enclosed commercial space.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition corridor leading to open urban street

events.description: exits indoor arcade into open urban street with tall buildings visible ahead

agents.ego_description: moving through the exit corridor and stepping out from the covered arcade into the city street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near the exit doorway ahead

entered.detail: open city street with orange-marked pedestrian crossings and vehicle lanes
overhead pedestrian bridge with large blue 'CIRRUS' signage spanning the street
towering futuristic skyscraper with illuminated windows rising above the street

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the indoor arcade through a narrow corridor, transitioning to an open urban street. The Cirrus sign bridge becomes visible overhead as the scene shifts from artificial indoor lighting to the mixed lighting of the city at dusk.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon between skyscrapers with overhead walkways

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at tall building facades and overhead structural walkways

agents.ego_description: walking along the street while looking up at the towering architecture and overhead bridges

notable_agents.action: pedestrian taking a photo with a camera device at 28 seconds

tall street lighting pole with orange illumination

segments.scene_description: Walking through the urban canyon, the camera tilts up to admire the towering skyscrapers and overhead walkways against the dusk sky. The Cirrus sign moves to the right as the camera progresses, and a pedestrian is seen taking photographs near the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with neon storefronts and nightlife venues

events.description: multiple futuristic vehicles including a black SUV and yellow sedan pass by on the street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past neon-lit storefronts and oncoming traffic

notable_agents.action: yellow futuristic sedan driving past on the street
pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the Bliss nightclub

entered.detail: nightclub entrance with large neon 'Bliss' signage and purple lighting
multiple stacked digital advertisement screens spanning across the street
doorway with illuminated frame and signage

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the sidewalk past the Bliss nightclub with its prominent neon signage. Several futuristic vehicles pass by on the street, including a yellow sedan and black SUV. The camera approaches a building entrance while overhead billboards display advertisements in the dense commercial district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the enclosed, neon-lit interior of a gaming arcade out into the sprawling, vertical expanse of a futuristic city at dusk. It begins by gliding through a narrow indoor corridor lined with gaming cabinets and vending machines, where colorful artificial lights reflect off the concrete floor. As the camera exits the arcade, the enclosed space opens into a wide urban street, shifting the lighting from interior neon to the dim, atmospheric glow of the city under a Cirrus sign bridge. The scene then expands upward as the camera tilts to capture towering skyscrapers and overhead walkways, passing a pedestrian taking photographs before moving further into the urban canyon. Finally, the movement follows the sidewalk past the vibrant neon signage of the Bliss nightclub and flowing futuristic traffic, ending as the camera approaches a building entrance beneath massive overhead billboards.
